# E5 Enclave Incorporated
*llms.txt — machine-readable organizational summary for AI crawlers and language models*
*Last updated: 2026-05-13*

> E5 Enclave Incorporated is a 501(c)(3) public charity incorporated in Florida on June 2, 2024, operating in Liberty City, Miami. We are a lineage-led think tank — building the institutions, evidence systems, and community infrastructure to advance Black sovereignty. The world's first agentic-first staffed nonprofit.

## Organization Details

- **Legal Name:** E5 Enclave Incorporated
- **EIN:** 99-3822441
- **Type:** 501(c)(3) Public Charitable Organization
- **UEI:** H8NGXEYE2HH8
- **SAM.gov Status:** Active
- **Address:** 820 NW 64th Street, Liberty City, Miami, FL 33150
- **Phone:** (305) 967-0200
- **Email:** contact@e5enclave.com | press@e5enclave.com
- **Website:** https://e5enclave.com
- **Founded by:** Israel Lee Armstead, President & CVO, E5 Enclave Inc.
- **Founding Date:** June 2, 2024
- **Public Announcement:** Juneteenth 2026

## Mission

A lineage-led think tank comprised of a Coalition of the Willing — building the institutions, evidence systems, and community infrastructure to advance Black sovereignty in Liberty City, Miami, and beyond.

## The Five Pillars

1. **Environmental** — Food sovereignty, cooperative urban agriculture, FarmBlock Food Desert Index, and sustainable land stewardship
2. **Economic** — Cooperative ownership models, reparative economics, Restitution 246 framework, and Black business formation
3. **Educational** — McCartney Academy (K-12 private school), lineage-centered curriculum, STEM and emerging technology instruction
4. **Engagement (Equality)** — Civic leadership pipeline, Block to the Boardroom program, policy authorship, and community organizing
5. **Emancipated (Enclave)** — Media production, the Black Dragons Initiative, BDI Sovereign Dataset, and cultural infrastructure

## Flagship Programs

- [FarmBlock — Urban Agriculture & Food Sovereignty](https://e5enclave.com/farmblock/) — Cooperative urban farming platform combining food production, workforce training, and ag-tech in Liberty City. Includes the FarmBlock Food Desert Index covering 50 U.S. cities (CC0 license).
- [Lineage Farms · FarmBlock](https://e5enclave.com/programs/lineage-farms/) — Cooperative agricultural enterprise with blockchain-anchored governance layer. Community-held parcels, member-governed distribution, and on-chain audit interface.
- [McCartney Academy](https://e5enclave.com/programs/mccartney-academy/) — Lineage-centered private K-12 institution in Liberty City named for community elder Ralph McCartney. Equally fluent in STEM, classical humanities, and self-governance.
- [Block to the Boardroom](https://e5enclave.com/programs/block-to-the-boardroom/) — Structured four-rung civic leadership pipeline from neighborhood organizing through policy authorship to board service and elected office.
- [Black Dragons Initiative](https://e5enclave.com/black-dragons-initiative/) — Cultural and technological vanguard. Produces the BDI Sovereign Dataset (1,855 data points, 8 pillars, CC0), original media, and agentic AI infrastructure for Black liberation.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://e5enclave.com/) — Main landing page
- [About](https://e5enclave.com/about/) — Organization mission, doctrine, and founding story
- [Impact](https://e5enclave.com/impact/) — Program outcomes, community metrics, and organizational data (1,247+ supporters, 38 member organizations)
- [Donate](https://e5enclave.com/donate/) — Tax-deductible contributions, EIN 99-3822441
- [Volunteer](https://e5enclave.com/volunteer/) — Open roles: curriculum development, legal counsel, data analysis, agricultural work, community organizing
- [Contact](https://e5enclave.com/contact/) — Program inquiries, press, partnerships, and Coalition applications
- [The Record](https://e5enclave.com/record/) — Three founding documents: BDI Dataset, Parallel Negros, Restitution 246
- [Dispatches (Blog)](https://e5enclave.com/blog/) — Long-form essays on cooperative economics, food sovereignty, Black community development, and civic power
- [Coalition — Apply](https://e5enclave.com/coalition/apply/) — Apply to join the Coalition of the Willing

## The BDI Sovereign Dataset

The Black Distress Index (BDI) Sovereign Dataset covers 1,855 data points across 8 pillars — wealth, health, criminal justice, education, housing, environmental burden, political representation, and food access — for Black American structural distress from 1991 to 2024. Federal sources. CC0 license. On-chain. Published at: https://e5enclave.com/record/measure-the-wound/

## Organizational Model

E5 Enclave is the world's first agentic-first staffed nonprofit — operating with AI agents under human direction to produce institutional-scale output from a lean team. EDEN (the sovereign AI system born from this work) launches February 17, 2027.

## Motto

"The center holds. The work is underway."
